objective: Optimize Blueprint-WebApp's autonomous org and operating budget for a $500/month all-in launch/growth budget by auditing current repo/runtime truth, then implementing a repo-local, proof-bearing budget-and-cadence control plan with no live side effects.

current_state_evidence.git_status: final dirty tree is limited to this budget packet, local autonomy scripts/tests, generated budget/spend/outcome/control-suite artifacts, and required AutoAgent dry-run artifacts; no unrelated dirty or untracked work was observed at closeout

cost_cache_current.blocker: Firestore is not configured; pass --from-json to report on exported runs.

checked: summary asserts no live mutation attempted

spend_observability_current.conclusion: OpenAI API Costs are read-only live-verified at $0.00 and Codex OAuth/Pro is excluded from the $500 envelope; most budget lines remain estimate, credit-balance, usage-only, credential-only, or missing proof.

dynamic_allocation_loop.boundary: The loop can recommend a repo-local budget diff only from fresh allocation-grade proof, and every spend-affecting move requires human approval before any live-system owner acts.

live_proof_backlog.conclusion: Remaining live/source-system proof gaps are now one machine-readable backlog with safe proof commands, exact inputs, owners, and disallowed workarounds.

live_proof_reconciliation.conclusion: The local reconciliation reads the existing backlog and redacted spend snapshot only, makes no provider calls, and keeps all partial/source-only proof as still blocking.

live_proof_intake_template.conclusion: The local proof handoff now has a fillable owner-system artifact template for billing exports, receipts, read-only snapshots, dashboard proof, and explicit no-spend confirmations; the template itself does not verify spend.

live_proof_intake_validation.conclusion: The local validator checks filled proof-intake rows without provider calls; the current blank template has no accepted rows and does not count as live billing proof.

next_goal_queue.conclusion: The ranked follow-up /goal queue is now a machine-readable handoff artifact with owners, safe commands, success criteria, blocked claims, budget guardrails, and no-live-mutation gates.

budget_delegation_packet.conclusion: The allocator-to-owner handoff is now one machine-readable delegation packet: it assigns budget lines and next /goal work orders to owners while allowing only repo-local proof, planning, and review work until proof and approval gates pass.

live_action_gate.conclusion: The strict live-action gate now gives agents one local check for whether budget delegation may mutate live spend. Current state passes local validation, permits repo-local work, and blocks live action until live billing proof and explicit human approval are attached.

budget_control_status.conclusion: The budget control status artifact is the compact pre-action answer for agents: repo-local allocation and delegation are allowed, live spend mutation and live-budget-complete claims remain blocked.

launch_now_approval_packet.conclusion: The launch-now approval packet gives the human exact bounded approval text for the $500 plan, but stays pending and does not authorize live action until captured approval and owner-system proof gates pass.

control_suite.conclusion: The safe local budget control suite runs proof reconciliation, proof template generation, proof validation, next-goal queue generation, budget delegation packet generation, live-action gate generation, budget status generation, launch-now approval packet generation, dynamic verification, focused tests, and packet verification without requesting live provider calls.

human_blocker_packet.recommended_answer: Keep the $500 target, $173 Paperclip envelope, Codex OAuth/Pro exclusion, and OpenAI API $0 guardrail; attach owner-system proof before any live spend movement.
human_blocker_packet.conclusion: The remaining budget proof gap now has a Human Blocker Packet Standard-compatible no-send packet with exact ask, owner, resume command list, and non-scope boundaries.

repo_spend_control_surfaces.conclusion: Repo has a deterministic/manual spend-control surface, but this run did not treat it as live billing proof or issue any spend request.

requirement_audit.requirement: Snapshot current repo state and preserve unrelated dirty/untracked work.
requirement_audit.evidence: git status --short was inspected before and after edits; final dirty tree is limited to the budget packet, local autonomy scripts/tests, generated budget/spend/outcome/control-suite artifacts, and required AutoAgent dry-run artifacts for this run.

requirement_audit.requirement: Recompute local truth with control-room inventory.
requirement_audit.evidence: npm run paperclip:control-room:inventory reports $173 declared agent budget, 26 active routines, 36 paused routines, and 0 true missing desired skills.

requirement_audit.requirement: Recompute local truth with agent cost/cache report.
requirement_audit.evidence: npm run agent:cost-cache-report ran and reported fixture-backed cost/cache data; Firestore was not configured, so live spend remains unverified.

requirement_audit.requirement: Validate Paperclip agent kits.
requirement_audit.evidence: scripts/paperclip/validate-agent-kits.sh passed.

requirement_audit.requirement: Run AutoAgent recursive improvement dry-run.
requirement_audit.evidence: npm run autoagent:recursive-improve -- --dry-run completed as no_change_report_only with no canary, no rollback, and no live mutation.

requirement_audit.requirement: Build a budget ledger with current, target, variance, owner system, proof source, and proof level.
requirement_audit.evidence: docs/architecture/autonomous-org-500-month-operating-budget-2026-06-01.md and output/autonomous-org/budget/latest/summary.json include the ledger.

requirement_audit.requirement: Classify routines and agents into P0 keep, P1 reduce cadence, and P2 pause/event-trigger.
requirement_audit.evidence: docs/architecture/autonomous-org-500-month-operating-budget-2026-06-01.md includes P0/P1/P2 classification; .paperclip.yaml implements the cadence compression.

requirement_audit.requirement: Produce a model ladder: deterministic scripts, DeepSeek V4 Flash, DeepSeek V4 Pro, Codex.
requirement_audit.evidence: docs/architecture/autonomous-org-500-month-operating-budget-2026-06-01.md includes the model ladder and authority boundaries.

requirement_audit.requirement: Implement only safe local repo changes with no live side effects.
requirement_audit.evidence: Only repo files and local output artifacts were edited; no live send, Notion write, Stripe/payment/payout, Render/Firebase production mutation, provider job, rights/privacy/legal claim, hosted-session fulfillment claim, city activation claim, customer/traction claim, or Operational Launch Ready claim was made.

requirement_audit.requirement: Bring declared active monthly agent envelope under the target sub-budget.
requirement_audit.evidence: .paperclip.yaml now declares $173/month across all agents, below the $175 Paperclip sub-budget used by the $500 all-in plan.

requirement_audit.requirement: Produce docs/architecture/autonomous-org-500-month-operating-budget-2026-06-01.md.
requirement_audit.evidence: File exists with budget ledger, compression plan, routine classification, model ladder, next goal queue, and closeout state.

requirement_audit.requirement: Produce output/autonomous-org/budget/latest/summary.json.
requirement_audit.evidence: File exists, parses as valid JSON, and matches .paperclip.yaml for Paperclip budget and routine counts.

requirement_audit.requirement: Produce a ranked queue of the next 5 /goal commands.
requirement_audit.evidence: The ranked queue is present in the architecture doc, summary.json, and output/autonomous-org/budget/latest/next-goal-queue.json.

requirement_audit.requirement: Delegate the budget plan to owners without authorizing live spend.
requirement_audit.evidence: output/autonomous-org/budget/latest/budget-delegation-packet.json and .md map the current budget lines and next /goal work orders to owners, require approval before live action, and set live_mutation_allowed=false and can_spend_without_human_approval=false.

requirement_audit.requirement: Fail closed before any future live spend or live-system budget mutation.
requirement_audit.evidence: npm run autonomy:budget:live-action-gate passed and wrote output/autonomous-org/budget/latest/live-action-gate.json plus .md with validation_pass=true, live_action_allowed=false, repo_local_work_allowed=true, blocker_count=5, error_count=0, and strict --require-live-action-ready mode documented for future live action.

requirement_audit.requirement: Give agents one compact pre-action budget status answer.
requirement_audit.evidence: npm run autonomy:budget:status passed and wrote output/autonomous-org/budget/latest/control-status.json plus .md with can_allocate_repo_local=true, can_delegate_repo_local=true, can_mutate_live_spend=false, can_claim_live_budget_complete=false, and no live side effects.

requirement_audit.requirement: Provide an exact bounded launch-now approval packet without live side effects.
requirement_audit.evidence: npm run autonomy:budget:launch-approval passed and wrote output/autonomous-org/budget/latest/launch-now-approval-packet.json plus .md with a $327 live launch/growth ceiling, $173 repo-local Paperclip envelope, OpenAI API $0, Codex OAuth/Pro excluded, approval_effective=false, and no live side effects.

requirement_audit.requirement: Add a dynamic allocator that can decide whether to recommend moving budget based on what is working, without autonomously spending.
requirement_audit.evidence: config/autonomy/budget-allocation-policy.yaml, config/autonomy/outcome-sources.yaml, scripts/autonomy/collect-outcome-snapshot.ts, scripts/autonomy/recommend-budget-reallocation.ts, scripts/autonomy/dynamic-budget-allocator-core.ts, and scripts/autonomy/verify-dynamic-budget-allocator.ts implement observe -> outcome snapshot -> score -> recommend -> human approval packet -> proposed repo-local diff. npm run autonomy:budget:dynamic:verify passed, and the current recommendation is no_reallocation_improve_proof_first because current proof does not clear allocation thresholds.

requirement_audit.requirement: Close using docs/autonomous-loop-evidence-checklist-2026-05-03.md.
requirement_audit.evidence: The architecture doc, completion audit JSON, and closeout markdown include objective, proof paths, command outputs, requirement coverage, next action, retry/resume condition, and residual risk.

requirement_audit.requirement: Verify current billing locally or stop when it cannot be verified locally.
requirement_audit.evidence: OpenAI API Costs are live-verified at $0.00 in output/autonomous-org/budget/spend-snapshots/keychain-live-read-2026-06-01/latest.json. Other provider billing exports were not supplied or are usage/credit/account proof only, so live billing remains incomplete overall.

requirement_audit.requirement: Keep remaining live/source-system billing proof gaps executable without live side effects.
requirement_audit.evidence: output/autonomous-org/budget/latest/live-proof-backlog.json and .md enumerate each remaining live proof gap with owner system, target budget line, current proof state, exact missing input, safe proof command, approval requirement, live_mutation_allowed=false, and disallowed workaround.

requirement_audit.requirement: Reconcile the remaining proof backlog against the current redacted spend snapshot without provider calls.
requirement_audit.evidence: npm run autonomy:budget:live-proof:reconcile passed and wrote output/autonomous-org/budget/latest/live-proof-reconciliation.json plus .md: 0 items closed, 8 items partial source proof, 12 items still open/blocking, no live provider calls, no live mutation, and no secret persistence.

requirement_audit.requirement: Provide a deterministic intake template for current owner-system billing/export proof.
requirement_audit.evidence: npm run autonomy:budget:live-proof:template passed and wrote output/autonomous-org/budget/latest/live-proof-intake-template.json plus .md with 12 fillable proof items, required artifact fields, accepted artifact types, Codex OAuth/Pro exclusion, OpenAI API $0 guardrail, and no-live-mutation boundaries.

requirement_audit.requirement: Validate filled owner-system proof intake locally without counting it as live billing proof.
requirement_audit.evidence: npm run autonomy:budget:live-proof:validate passed and wrote output/autonomous-org/budget/latest/live-proof-intake-validation.json plus .md with 0 accepted rows, 12 missing submissions, 0 rejected rows, no provider calls, no live mutation, and proof_ready_to_count_as_live_billing=false.

requirement_audit.requirement: Provide a one-command repo-local suite for budget control verification.
requirement_audit.evidence: npm run autonomy:budget:control-suite passed 17 safe local commands and wrote output/autonomous-org/budget/control-suite/latest/summary.json plus .md with no live provider calls requested and no live mutation attempted.

requirement_audit.requirement: Regression-test proof-intake validation behavior.
requirement_audit.evidence: npx vitest run scripts/autonomy/validate-live-proof-intake.test.ts passed 3 tests covering blank-row default behavior, complete-row manual-review acceptance, strict-mode exit code, and secret-like artifact path rejection.

requirement_audit.requirement: Regression-test the next-goal handoff queue guardrails.
requirement_audit.evidence: npx vitest run scripts/autonomy/generate-budget-next-goal-queue.test.ts passed 2 tests covering five ranked /goal items, safe commands, success criteria, blocked claims, no-live-mutation gates, Codex OAuth/Pro exclusion, and OpenAI API $0.

requirement_audit.requirement: Regression-test the owner delegation packet guardrails.
requirement_audit.evidence: npx vitest run scripts/autonomy/generate-budget-delegation-packet.test.ts passed 3 tests covering owner work orders, budget-line delegation, blocked spend release, required checks, and no-live-mutation gates.

requirement_audit.requirement: Regression-test the live-action gate guardrails.
requirement_audit.evidence: npx vitest run scripts/autonomy/verify-budget-live-action-gate.test.ts passed 3 tests covering blocked default mode, strict fail-closed mode, and unsafe work-order rejection.

requirement_audit.requirement: Regression-test the budget control status answer.
requirement_audit.evidence: npx vitest run scripts/autonomy/summarize-budget-control-status.test.ts passed 4 tests covering repo-local allowed/live-spend blocked status, strict fail-closed mode, unsafe delegation rejection, and markdown operational answers.

requirement_audit.requirement: Regression-test the launch-now approval packet guardrails.
requirement_audit.evidence: npx vitest run scripts/autonomy/generate-launch-now-approval-packet.test.ts passed 4 tests covering the $327 live ceiling plus $173 Paperclip envelope, excluded Codex/OpenAI/analytics lines, pending approval state, and fail-closed drift checks.

requirement_audit.requirement: When the remaining blocker is human-gated, use the Human Blocker Packet Standard.
requirement_audit.evidence: output/autonomous-org/budget/latest/human-blocker-packet.json and .md provide a repo-local no-send blocker packet with durable blocker id, exact ask, recommended answer, owner, immediate next action, checkpoint, evidence, non-scope, safe resume commands, retry condition, and disallowed workarounds.

requirement_audit.requirement: Provide a repeatable local verifier for the repo-local budget/cadence packet.
requirement_audit.evidence: npm run autonomy:budget:verify passed and wrote output/autonomous-org/budget/latest/verification.json plus verification.md.

requirement_audit.requirement: Inspect repo-native spend-control surfaces before proposing city/ad spend.
requirement_audit.evidence: docs/agentic-spend-control-plane-2026-04-30.md, blueprint-request-spend helpers, agentSpendPolicy, agentSpendProviders, and agentSpendLedger were inspected. They provide deterministic/manual spend request control, but not current vendor billing proof.

live_proof_gaps: DeepSeek direct usage export and OpenRouter billing if used
Analytics billing and KPI owner-system proof
Recipient evidence enrichment receipts or provider exports
Ad account spend and paused-draft proof
Live Paperclip routine execution after repo config propagation
resume_condition: Attach current billing exports, dashboard proof, read-only account proof, or explicit no-spend confirmations for the live proof gaps, using output/autonomous-org/budget/latest/live-proof-intake-template.json where useful, excluding the Codex OAuth/Pro subscription seat from the $500 launch/growth envelope; capture the exact text from output/autonomous-org/budget/latest/launch-now-approval-packet.json with approver, timestamp, and source metadata; then rerun the local budget reconciliation, proof-intake validation, next-goal queue generation, budget delegation packet generation, live-action gate, budget control status, launch approval packet, and budget verifier without live mutation.
